mapper.select: SELECT QandAno AS id, question AS content, answer AS answer, createddate AS createdAt FROM qanda ORDER BY createddate DESC, QandAno DESC
SELECT QandAno AS id, question AS content, answer AS answer, createddate AS createdAt FROM qanda WHERE QandAno = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qanda ( memberNo, question, createddate ) VALUES ( 1, #{content}, NOW() )
